name: <tool-name>-quality
description: Quality comparison for <tool-name> skill. Replace <placeholders> with your values.

evals.name: happy-path-basic
evals.context: User wants to perform the most common operation with this tool.
evals.expected_output: Agent should execute the command correctly and show results

evals.name: happy-path-with-args
evals.expected_output: Agent should pass the argument correctly to the command

evals.name: context-inference

conversation_history.content: Got it. What would you like to do?

evals.context: User gave context earlier, now uses shorthand.
evals.expected_output: Agent should infer full intent from conversation history

evals.name: error-invalid-input
evals.context: User provides invalid input that should fail gracefully.
evals.expected_output: Agent should report the error clearly and suggest fixes

evals.name: error-auth-missing
evals.context: Tool requires authentication that may not be configured.
evals.expected_output: Agent should detect auth issue and guide setup

evals.name: edge-unusual-format
evals.context: Valid but non-standard usage of the tool.
evals.expected_output: Agent should handle it correctly or explain limitations

assertions.description: Attempts to handle or explains why not
